name: The 'log_temp_files' database flag for Cloud SQL PostgreSQL instance is set to '0' (on)
query: { cloudSqlInstances( where: { engine: { eq: "postgresql" } cloudProvider: { eq: "gcp" } OR: [ { dbFlags_NONE: { name: { eq: "log_temp_files" } } } { dbFlags_SOME: { name: { eq: "log_temp_files" }, NOT: {value: { eq: "0" }} } } ] } ) { ...AssetFragment }}
